Director, Performance Marketing

Location

New York, NY (HQ)

Overview

About Ramp

Ramp is building the smart infrastructure for finance teams, embedded in the transaction flow of every dollar a business spends.

What You'll Do

  • Own and scale Ramp's paid acquisition strategy across channels.

  • Partner with data science to build attribution models.

What You Need

  • 7+ years of performance marketing experience.
